data.title: Quadient expands European open locker network in Italy. Launch of Parcel Pending network is strategic milestone in European expansion.
data.description: Quadient (Euronext Paris: QDT), a leading global intelligent automation platform that facilitates secure and expert business interactions, revealed the introduction of the Parcel Pending by Quadient open locker network in Italy. This move signifies a significant advancement in its European growth strategy.
Cybersecurity firm NRD achieves milestone in Bangladesh, eyes regional growth after successful phase.

data.title: Energy secretary proposes faster grid access for AI and crypto miners. CEO of CleanSpark supports, says expedited connections to be available.
data.description: The CEO of CleanSpark, S. Matthew Schultz, announced that the updated regulations will facilitate quicker links for Bitcoin mining and data centers.

data.title: 2009 wallet linked to Satoshi started moving Bitcoin after a decade; inactive since 2011, mined coins in 2009.
data.description: The Bitcoin whale from the era of Satoshi Nakamoto was most recently active in June 2011. This whale had accumulated its coins through mining operations conducted between April and June 2009, a short period after the Bitcoin network was launched.

data.title: Aussies lead in crypto interest with 11.16M users expected by next year, as 41% of population engages in cryptocurrencies.
data.description: It is anticipated that the number of cryptocurrency users in Australia will surge to 11.16 million by the upcoming year, representing almost 41% of the Australian population engaged in cryptocurrency activities.

data.title: Individual miner earns $347K by successfully mining block 920,440, showcasing complete self-sovereignty.
data.description: One individual Bitcoin miner successfully solved block 920,440 independently and received a substantial reward for their efforts.

data.title: DeFi perpetuals trading hits $1T+ in October, marked by surge in volume from Hyperliquid, Aster, and Lighter. Beat August record by a week.
data.description: In October, decentralized perpetuals trading volume surged to surpass $1 trillion, driven by Hyperliquid, Aster, and Lighter. This figure exceeded August's total with a week remaining in the month.
Dollar/yen hits two week high of 153.01, last up 0.24% at 152.96

data.title: Hexagon reports 4% organic revenue growth in Q3 2025, with net sales of 1,303.8 MEUR.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2025, a 4% organic revenue growth was reported when using fixed exchange rates and a comparable group structure. Net sales saw an increase of 0% to reach 1,303.8 million euros (compared to 1,299.8 million euros). When factoring in the reduction of acquired deferred revenue, net sales totaled 1,303.1 million euros.
Bekaert provides update on share buyback program and liquidity agreement.

data.title: WLFI token of World Liberty Financial sees 30% drop in 2 weeks, might dip below $0.1. Investors worry about project's future.
data.description: The cryptocurrency token WLFI issued by World Liberty Financial has seen a significant 30% decrease in value over a span of two weeks. This decline has raised worries among investors about the possibility of the token falling below the $0.1 mark. Many investors have voiced their disappointment with the slow advancement of the project.
